title: If truncate is in transaction then after restart of MonetDB the table is empty
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (col1 INT, col2 VARCHAR(50), col3 DATE);
CREATE TABLE test_new (col1 INT PRIMARY KEY, col2 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_new (col1, col2) SELECT col1, col2 FROM test WHERE col1 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Truncate within transaction causes data loss after restart
